name: Vanguard Service Orchestration Demo
description: Deck-aligned multi-agent retirement-service demo with portfolio review, contribution management, rollover coordination, and market insights.

Vanguard_Supervisor.description: Routes investors to the right retirement-service specialist

Portfolio_Review.description: Reviews retirement account balances and position snapshots

Contribution_Manager.description: Checks IRA limits and schedules demo contributions

Rollover_Specialist.description: Coordinates rollover intake and advisor follow-up

Market_Insights.description: Provides general market and policy guidance

get_household_accounts.description: Demo household account list and top-line summary

get_portfolio_snapshot.description: Demo position snapshot for the selected account

extract_contribution_amount.description: Parse an explicitly requested contribution amount from the user's message

extract_rollover_source.description: Parse a likely rollover source plan from the user's message

search_demo_policy_library.description: Curated fallback policy and market knowledge search
